fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the comment applies to a serial number or to a lot number.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item that the item tracking comment applies to.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Serial/Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number or lot number that the comment applies to.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the comment line.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date to reference the comment.
